title: View All Campaigns (Admin)
postconditions: Admin is viewing a global list of all campaigns across the system
trigger: Admin navigates to the Global Campaigns Dashboard

main_scenario.action: Admin navigates to the Global Campaigns Dashboard
System retrieves a complete list of all campaigns in the system
System displays the campaigns, including the GM owner's username for context

exceptions.action: System displays an empty state message

acceptance_criteria: All campaigns are displayed, regardless of owner.
Only users with the Admin role can access this view.
